title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital Global Group - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Reliance Digital Global Group - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Digital Global Group! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Digital Global Group:
Reliance Digital Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Global Group!
